text.title: Stakeholder Walkthrough Script Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Stakeholder Walkthrough Script end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: frame-decision-ask
step.action: Open with the single-sentence decision-ask + parking convention.

step.name: present-options
step.action: Show options at comparable fidelity; name trade-offs explicitly.

step.name: facilitate-decision
step.action: Drive to a signed-decision line within 15 minutes.

step.name: recap-and-close
step.action: Recap decision + parked items + revisit-gates; close on time.

step.name: log-and-store
step.action: Run validator; commit; create design-decision-log row.
